minimum_r6_rule: At least one synthetic controlled dataset, one public EEG/BCI dataset, and one adversarial/null-heavy dataset must be reproducible from public instructions before R6 can be claimed.

synthetic_controlled_v0.source: Repository-generated synthetic signals from BSFF synthetic utilities and examples.
synthetic_controlled_v0.license: GPL-3.0-or-later for code-generated artifacts unless an output artifact declares otherwise.
synthetic_controlled_v0.artifact_hash_reference: to be emitted by reproduce.sh once the full R6 artifact bundle is generated
synthetic_controlled_v0.inclusion_criteria: Controlled positive and negative signals with known expected falsification behavior.
synthetic_controlled_v0.exclusion_criteria: Any generator run without fixed seed, declared parameters, or expected verdict semantics.
synthetic_controlled_v0.subject_session_split: not applicable: synthetic generator has no human subjects
synthetic_controlled_v0.leakage_audit: generator parameters must not be inferred from evaluation labels beyond the declared positive/negative control design

bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.source: Andrzejak et al. 2001 Bonn EEG evidence as represented by committed BSFF artifacts.
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.license: External dataset license/terms must be verified before redistribution; committed evidence should reference derived artifacts and manifests.
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.inclusion_criteria: Committed Bonn S2 bright-line evidence package and protocol lock.
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.exclusion_criteria: Any untracked local dataset mutation, missing manifest, or drift from frozen evidence.
preprocessing_steps: run committed Bonn S2 reproduction entrypoint
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.subject_session_split: clustered repeated-segment design; seed-level and cluster-aware intervals are required
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.leakage_audit: result must report segment reuse, seed reuse, clustered uncertainty, and null-model specific false-positive rates
bonn_andrzejak_2001_s2.reproducibility_command: bsff evidence verify && bsff reproduce bonn-s2

external_replication_dataset_tbd.source: To be selected by an independent reviewer or preregistered before the R6 external reproduction candidate.
external_replication_dataset_tbd.license: must allow public scientific reproduction or documented controlled access
external_replication_dataset_tbd.inclusion_criteria: Public EEG/BCI or signal-processing corpus that can test BSFF claim semantics beyond the current internal evidence case.
external_replication_dataset_tbd.exclusion_criteria: Private-only data, unclear license, unverifiable preprocessing, or reviewer-dependent manual steps.
external_replication_dataset_tbd.leakage_audit: must include subject/session leakage controls before any R6 claim
